title: Career Profile Editor
createPrompt: Create your profile to get started. You can add work experience, education, and set up your public profile after.

job.title: Work Experience
job.noExperiences: No job experiences added yet. Click "Add Job Experience" to get started.
job.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this job experience?

education.title: Education
education.noRecords: No education records added yet. Click "Add Education" to get started.
education.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this education record?

slug.title: Public Profile
slug.label: Profile URL Slug
slug.invalidFormat: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. No consecutive hyphens.
slug.changeWarning: Changing your URL will make the old one inaccessible immediately.
slug.changeCost: Changing your slug costs {{cost}} coins. Your balance: {{balance}} coins.
slug.notEnoughCoins: You do not have enough coins to make this change.
slug.savedSuccess: Slug updated successfully! Your profile is live at: /p/{{slug}}
slug.failedToUpdate: Failed to update slug. Please try again.
